Wine raspberries extensive patches throughout the park. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-July.
Waterfront serviceberries, within reach of playground and beach! Regularly affected by galls, so mind what fruit you take. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-August.
2 Croton Point Ave, Croton-On-Hudson, NY 10520, USA

Several serviceberry trees in public park between paved walking path and parking lot. Juniper trees nearby means a lot of Gymnosporangium (rust) infected fruits, but still many good ones. Several more serviceberry trees to the south east along the path. Access
Abundant and beautiful wine raspberries lining the entire park! You don’t have to go far-lots of berries available upon entrance. Access: Public.
